name: Microwave Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart glass bowl, microwave sugar, corn syrup and water on FULL POWER for 12 to 18 minutes, or until the mixture spins a fine thread.
2. In another bowl, add salt to egg whites and beat constantly until the whites are stiff and form peaks.
3. Slowly pour a thin stream of syrup mixture into the egg whites, beating constantly until the mixture loses shine and thickens.
4. Stir in vanilla and pecans.
5. Drop by teaspoonsful onto waxed paper.
